name: @ever-works/secret-store-gcp-sm-plugin
description: GCP Secret Manager SecretStoreResolver plugin for Ever Works — resolves gcp-sm:<project>/<secretName> pointers via the GCP Secret Manager REST API.

plugin.name: GCP Secret Manager Secret Store
plugin.description: Resolves gcp-sm:<project>/<secretName> pointers via the GCP Secret Manager REST API. Uses a pre-fetched bearer token from GCP_ACCESS_TOKEN env var (operators provision via Workload Identity, gcloud auth print-access-token, or sidecar token-refresher).

envVars.name: GCP_ACCESS_TOKEN
envVars.description: OAuth2 access token with secretmanager.secretAccessor role on the requested secrets. Operators refresh out-of-band (Workload Identity sidecar, gcloud, etc.).
